# CV Revamp

> CV Revamp (cvrevamp.info) is an automated, AI-assisted career-services bundle for professionals in the UAE and wider GCC. For one flat fee it delivers an ATS-ready CV rewrite, a LinkedIn optimization guide, 10+ curated UAE/GCC job matches, a personalized career strategy report, and a salary-negotiation cheat-sheet, all within 48 hours, with no subscription.

## What it is
- Operated by Synapticonn FZE (UAE).
- Price: $49.99 USD, one-time, billed in AED equivalent. [confirm before publish]
- Turnaround: 48 hours.
- Languages: English and Arabic.
- No subscription, no recurring charges.

## Who it is for
- Mid-to-senior professionals in the UAE and GCC job market who want a complete, fast, affordable alternative to high-touch career coaches.

## Key pages
- [Home and checkout](https://cvrevamp.info/)
- [Pricing details](https://cvrevamp.info/pricing.md)
